name: 8小时稳定性长跑测试 - 20个混合任务
description: 20个真实开发任务混合：文件读取、配置分析、测试执行、代码扫描。全部在 backend/ 目录下操作，验证项目各模块可独立运行。

tasks.label: 读取 package.json
tasks.prompt: Read the file backend/package.json. Extract and output the 'name', 'version' fields, and list all keys under 'scripts'. Format: 'Project: <name>, Version: <version>, Scripts: <comma-separated list of script names>'

tasks.label: 读取 tsconfig.json 配置
tasks.prompt: Read the file backend/tsconfig.json. Output the full content of the 'compilerOptions' section in JSON format. If compilerOptions contains nested objects like 'outDir', 'rootDir', 'paths', include them all.

tasks.label: 提取 main.ts 模块导入列表
tasks.prompt: Read the file backend/src/main.ts. Find the @Module() decorator (or any NestJS module decorator with an imports array). Extract and output the list of module names inside the 'imports' array. If there are multiple @Module decorators, combine all imports. Output format: one module name per line.

tasks.label: 执行 api-response 测试
tasks.prompt: Change to the backend/ directory, then run the command: npx jest src/common/dto/api-response.spec.ts --no-coverage --silent. Report: (1) whether all tests passed or any failed, (2) total number of tests run, (3) any failure messages if present. Use the exact command with npx from the backend directory.

tasks.label: 执行 logger 测试
tasks.prompt: Change to the backend/ directory, then run the command: npx jest src/utils/logger.spec.ts --no-coverage --silent. Report: (1) whether all tests passed or any failed, (2) total number of tests run, (3) any failure messages if present. Use the exact command with npx from the backend directory.

tasks.label: 执行 interceptors 测试
tasks.prompt: Change to the backend/ directory, then run the command: npx jest src/common/interceptors/ --no-coverage --silent. Report: (1) whether all tests passed or any failed, (2) total number of tests run, (3) any failure messages if present. Use the exact command with npx from the backend directory.

tasks.label: 提取 app.module 导入模块
tasks.prompt: Read the file backend/src/app.module.ts. Find the @Module() decorator. Extract and output all module names listed in the 'imports' array. Output them as a numbered list. If any import is an inline configuration object (like TypeOrmModule.forRoot(...)), include its name as well.

tasks.label: 扫描 filters 目录
tasks.prompt: List all .ts files under the directory backend/src/common/filters/. For each file, read its content and identify the class name(s) it exports and a brief description of the class purpose (e.g., exception filter, error handler). Output as a table: File | Class Name | Purpose

tasks.label: 扫描 interceptors 目录
tasks.prompt: List all .ts files under the directory backend/src/common/interceptors/. For each file, read its content and identify the class name(s) it exports and a brief description of the class purpose (e.g., logging interceptor, transform interceptor). Output as a table: File | Class Name | Purpose

tasks.label: 列出 guards 导出
tasks.prompt: List all .ts files under the directory backend/src/common/guards/. For each file, read its content and list every exported name (class, function, or constant). Output as: 'File: <filename> -> Exports: <exported names>'. If a file is a barrel (index.ts), list what it re-exports.

tasks.label: 列出 pipes 导出
tasks.prompt: List all .ts files under the directory backend/src/common/pipes/. For each file, read its content and list every exported name (class, function, or constant). Output as: 'File: <filename> -> Exports: <exported names>'. If a file is a barrel (index.ts), list what it re-exports.

tasks.label: 执行 student 模块测试
tasks.prompt: Change to the backend/ directory, then run the command: npx jest src/modules/student/ --no-coverage --silent. Report: (1) whether all tests passed or any failed, (2) total number of tests run, (3) any failure messages if present. Use the exact command with npx from the backend directory.

tasks.label: 执行 lesson 模块测试
tasks.prompt: Change to the backend/ directory, then run the command: npx jest src/modules/lesson/ --no-coverage --silent. Report: (1) whether all tests passed or any failed, (2) total number of tests run, (3) any failure messages if present. Use the exact command with npx from the backend directory.

tasks.label: 扫描 enrollment 端点
tasks.prompt: List the controller and service files under backend/src/modules/enrollment/. Read each controller file (.controller.ts) and extract all HTTP endpoint decorators (@Post, @Get, @Put, @Delete). For each endpoint, output: 'HTTP_METHOD <path> (handler: methodName)'. Also note the @Controller() prefix if present.

tasks.label: 扫描 attendance 端点
tasks.prompt: List the controller and service files under backend/src/modules/attendance/. Read each controller file (.controller.ts) and extract all HTTP endpoint decorators (@Post, @Get, @Put, @Delete). For each endpoint, output: 'HTTP_METHOD <path> (handler: methodName)'. Also note the @Controller() prefix if present.

tasks.label: 执行 attendance 模块测试
tasks.prompt: Change to the backend/ directory, then run the command: npx jest src/modules/attendance/ --no-coverage --silent. Report: (1) whether all tests passed or any failed, (2) total number of tests run, (3) any failure messages if present. Use the exact command with npx from the backend directory.

tasks.label: 执行 contract 模块测试
tasks.prompt: Change to the backend/ directory, then run the command: npx jest src/modules/contract/ --no-coverage --silent. Report: (1) whether all tests passed or any failed, (2) total number of tests run, (3) any failure messages if present. Use the exact command with npx from the backend directory.

tasks.label: 统计 modules 各子模块文件数
tasks.prompt: List all subdirectories under backend/src/modules/. For each subdirectory (module), count the number of .ts files within it (including nested subdirectories). Output as a table: 'Module Name | File Count'. Then output the total count of .ts files across all modules.

tasks.label: 扫描 shared 目录结构
tasks.prompt: Recursively list all .ts files under backend/src/shared/. For each file, read the first 20 lines (the imports/exports section) and output: 'File: <relative path> -> Exports: <list of exported names or brief description of the file content>'. If a file re-exports things from other modules via barrel exports, list what it re-exports.

tasks.label: 全量测试
tasks.prompt: Change to the backend/ directory, then run the command: npx jest --passWithNoTests --no-coverage --silent. Report: (1) total test suites, (2) total tests run, (3) overall pass/fail status, (4) any failure details. Also print the final summary line from the jest output. Use the exact command with npx from the backend directory.
